title: Recursive Fractal Tree
description: A generative organic structure based on recursive branching algorithms with slight random variations in angle and length.

title: Chromatic Wave
description: Sine wave overlapping patterns creating Moire-like effects and vibrant color gradients.

title: Abstract Topography
description: Simulated contour lines using stacked noise layers to mimic a shifting geographical map.

title: Neon Growth System
description: A generative system where lines expand from the center following a controlled random walk with glowing aesthetics.

title: Phyllotaxis Spirals
description: Mathematical spiral patterns inspired by the arrangement of leaves on a plant stem.
script: let n=0,c=4;function setup(){createCanvas(400,400);background(0);colorMode(HSB)}function draw(){let a=n*137.5;let r=c*sqrt(n);let x=r*cos(radians(a))+width/2;let y=r*sin(radians(a))+height/2;fill(n%256,255,255);noStroke();ellipse(x,y,4,4);n++}

title: Digital Rain (Matrix style)
description: Cascading characters that regenerate at different speeds, creating a classic cyberpunk data flow.

title: Ethereal Orbitals
description: A study of orbiting points leaving trails to form complex circular geometries over time.

title: Vera Molnár Homage
description: A tribute to pioneer Vera Molnár, using disordered grids and geometric repetition.

title: Molecular Bonding
description: Automated particles that form connections when they enter a specific proximity threshold.

title: Lissajous Curves
description: The visualization of complex harmonic motion using two perpendicular sine waves.

title: Cellular Automata - Wave
description: A variation of the Game of Life where cells evolve based on neighbor density, creating fluid-like motion.
script: let g;function setup(){createCanvas(400,400);g=new Array(40).fill(0).map(()=>new Array(40).fill(0).map(()=>random()>0.5?1:0))}function draw(){background(255);let ng=g.map(a=>[...a]);for(let i=0;i<40;i++){for(let j=0;j<40;j++){let n=0;for(let x=-1;x<=1;x++)for(let y=-1;y<=1;y++)n+=g[(i+x+40)%40][(j+y+40)%40];n-=g[i][j];if(g[i][j]==1&&(n<2||n>3))ng[i][j]=0;else if(g[i][j]==0&&n==3)ng[i][j]=1;fill(ng[i][j]?0:255);rect(i*10,j*10,10,10)}}g=ng}

title: Hyperbolic Orbit Trap
description: Mathematical visualization of points being trapped by gravitational centers, creating fractal-like aesthetics.
script: function setup(){createCanvas(windowWidth,windowHeight);background(0);strokeWeight(0.5)}function draw(){translate(width/2,height/2);let t=frameCount*0.02;for(let i=0;i<100;i++){let r=200*sin(t+i*0.1);let x=r*cos(i+t);let y=r*sin(i*1.5+t);stroke(map(sin(t),-1,1,100,255),150,255,50);line(x,y,sin(i)*width/2,cos(i)*height/2)}}

title: Flowing Perlin Strands
description: Thousands of tiny agents following a 3D noise field, leaving behind colorful semi-transparent silk-like trails.

title: Glitch Mosaic Architecture
description: A structural grid that breaks and reforms using recursive subdivisions, creating a digital-brutalist aesthetic.

title: Boids Minimalist Swarm
description: A simulation of collective behavior where simple agents follow laws of alignment and cohesion to form organic clusters.

title: Recursive Subdivisions
description: A geometric exploration of space where a grid recursively splits into smaller quadrangles based on a probability threshold.

title: Truchet Flow
description: Implementation of Truchet tiles using circular arcs to create a seamless, labyrinth-like decorative pattern.

title: Neon Grid glitch
description: A rectangular grid that occasionally shifts and 'glitches' its color offsets to create a digital aesthetic.

title: Dot Matrix Interference
description: A classic op-art pattern using shifting grids of dots to create flickering visual movements.

title: Abstract Topography
description: Layered Perlin noise contours that simulate a hand-drawn topographical map with varying elevation densities.
script: function setup(){createCanvas(windowWidth,windowHeight);noLoop()}function draw(){background(245,240,230);strokeWeight(1.2);for(let z=0;z<40;z++){let c=map(z,0,40,50,200);stroke(c,80,80,150);noFill();for(let i=0;i<20;i++){beginShape();for(let x=-50;x<width+50;x+=10){let n=noise(x*0.003,i*0.1,z*0.05);let y=i*40+n*150;vertex(x,y)}endShape()}}}

title: Substrate Crystal Growth
description: A growth algorithm that simulates 'cracks' or 'crystals' forming on a surface, inspired by the Substrate algorithm.

title: Digital Brutalism Grid
description: A stark, high-contrast grid of bold rectangles and circles that shift with a rigid, machine-like logic.

title: Interlocking Sine Scales
description: Overlapping scales that move independently, creating a pattern reminiscent of fish skin or reptilian armor.

title: Reaction-Diffusion Sketch
description: A simplified cellular automata that mimics biological patterns like leopard spots or brain corals.
script: let grid=[];function setup(){createCanvas(200,200);for(let x=0;x<width;x++){grid[x]=[];for(let y=0;y<height;y++){grid[x][y]=random()>0.9?1:0}}}function draw(){background(255);let next=[];for(let x=0;x<width;x++){next[x]=[];for(let y=0;y<height;y++){let neighbors=count(x,y);if(grid[x][y]==1&&(neighbors<2||neighbors>3))next[x][y]=0;else if(grid[x][y]==0&&neighbors==3)next[x][y]=1;else next[x][y]=grid[x][y];if(next[x][y]==1){stroke(0);point(x,y)}}}grid=next}function count(x,y){let s=0;for(let i=-1;i<2;i++){for(let j=-1;j<2;j++){let col=(x+i+width)%width;let row=(y+j+height)%height;s+=grid[col][row]}}return s-grid[x][y]}

title: Bauhaus Kinetic Grid
description: A rhythmic reconstruction of Bauhaus aesthetics using rotating semi-circles and squares in a primary color palette.

title: Hyper-Speed Optical Tiles
description: High-contrast perspective lines that converge and diverge, creating an aggressive sense of forward motion and depth.

title: Prismatic Hex-Flow
description: An interlocking hexagonal lattice where each cell shifts its internal gradient based on a multi-layered noise field.
script: function setup(){createCanvas(windowWidth,600);noStroke()}function draw(){background(15);let r=40;let h=sqrt(3)*r;for(let y=0;y<height+h;y+=h){for(let x=0;x<width+r;x+=r*1.5){let off=(floor(x/(r*1.5))%2==0)?0:h/2;let n=noise(x*0.01,y*0.01,frameCount*0.02);fill(n*255,(1-n)*100,255);push();translate(x,y+off);beginShape();for(let a=0;a<TWO_PI;a+=TWO_PI/6){vertex(cos(a)*r*0.9,sin(a)*r*0.9)}endShape(CLOSE);pop()}}}

title: Overlapping Spheres
description: Simulated 3D spheres created through concentric 2D circles that produce interference patterns when they intersect.
script: function setup(){createCanvas(600,600);noFill()}function draw(){background(255);let t=frameCount*0.01;drawOrb(width*0.4,height*0.5,t);drawOrb(width*0.6,height*0.5,-t)}function drawOrb(cx,cy,rot){for(let r=10;r<300;r+=10){stroke(0,150);let x=cx+cos(rot)*20;let y=cy+sin(rot)*20;ellipse(x,y,r,r)}}

title: Nested Square Recursion
description: A pattern of squares within squares, each rotating at a speed inversely proportional to its size, creating a hypnotic tunnel effect.

title: Diamond Wave Tiling
description: A field of diamond shapes that tilt and change color in a wave-like motion across the screen.
script: function setup(){createCanvas(windowWidth,windowHeight)}function draw(){background(10);let sz=50;for(let x=0;x<width;x+=sz){for(let y=0;y<height;y+=sz){let d=dist(x,y,width/2,height/2);let a=sin(d*0.01-frameCount*0.05)*QUARTER_PI;push();translate(x+sz/2,y+sz/2);rotate(a);fill(map(sin(a),-1,1,100,255),50,150);noStroke();quad(0,-sz/2,sz/3,0,0,sz/2,-sz/3,0);pop()}}}
